ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the entry was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the entry was recorded */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year when the entry was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year when the entry was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the entry */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week when the entry was recorded (1=Monday, 7=Sunday) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the devices table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., temperature, CPU usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., temperature change, status update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., system, user, network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed time series data entry */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data (e.g., date range, metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_data" (
  "agg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated entry */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., average, sum) */,
  "value" REAL /* Computed value from the aggregation */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the aggregation is calculated (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the aggregation period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End timestamp of the aggregation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., IoT sensor, server) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
